documents.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
documents.description: A mutual (bilateral) NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Protects confidential information shared between two parties exploring a potential business relationship.

documents.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
documents.description: The cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Fill in the business terms and sign with your counterparty; it incorporates the standard terms by reference.

documents.name: Cloud Service Agreement
documents.description: A standard agreement for SaaS and cloud software vendors. Covers subscription terms, service levels, data handling, and liability for cloud-based services.

documents.name: Design Partner Agreement
documents.description: An agreement for early-stage product partnerships. Allows a vendor to work closely with a design partner to shape product development in exchange for early access and feedback.

documents.name: Service Level Agreement
documents.description: Defines the uptime, performance commitments, and remedies a cloud service provider makes to its customers, typically used as an addendum to a CSA.

documents.name: Professional Services Agreement
documents.description: A standard agreement for professional and consulting services engagements. Covers scope of work, deliverables, payment, IP ownership, and confidentiality.

documents.name: Data Processing Agreement
documents.description: A GDPR-compliant data processing agreement defining the obligations of a data processor on behalf of a data controller. Includes standard contractual clauses and security requirements.

documents.name: Software License Agreement
documents.description: A standard agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software. Covers license grants, restrictions, support, warranties, and liability.

documents.name: Partnership Agreement
documents.description: A standard agreement governing a business partnership between two companies, including referral arrangements, co-sell commitments, and revenue sharing.

documents.name: Pilot Agreement
documents.description: A short-term trial or evaluation agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a full commercial deal.

documents.name: Business Associate Agreement
documents.description: A HIPAA-compliant agreement for vendors who handle protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity. Required under US healthcare law.

documents.name: AI Addendum
documents.description: An addendum covering AI-specific provisions including data usage for model training, AI output disclaimers, and acceptable use restrictions for AI-powered products.
